title: Cryptool.io is live with the new landing page
content_html:
The new Cryptool landing page is now live at cryptool.io.

The team is actively collecting feedback from the community. Anything that feels unclear, anything that could be better, please send it through. The current site is a foundation, and the next iteration will be shaped directly by what users say.

The platform modules behind the site are the next thing going live.
author: Cryptool
